selection.selection_reasoning: Selected WORLD-OCEAN_RESEARCH_OBSERVATORY (Ocean Research Observatory) for topic='Octopus hearts' via semantic overlap=1.0 and accuracy=88

world.name: Ocean Research Observatory

environment.description: Coastal ocean research observatory with sealed viewing glass, wet-lab benches, and deep-blue water beyond

lighting.base: cool marine spill from viewport + warm console practicals

design_rules: Keep set geometry continuous across scenes
Vary camera and lighting, not the world itself
Every object must sit on a defined surface
scientific_constraints: Octopus systemic + branchial hearts depiction must remain anatomically labeled as educational model
Viewport glass separates dry observatory from seawater
Equipment stays grounded on benches or floors

accuracy.geographic: generic coastal observatory (not a named facility)

zones.name: Observation Chamber
zones.description: Dry observatory room with research console facing the facility

zones.name: Underwater Viewing Area
zones.description: Pressure-glass wall looking into blue water with specimen markers

zones.name: Scientific Display Station
zones.description: Anatomy display station with heart diagram and holographic model

continuity.note: Same world across scenes; zone may change; object positions inherited from state
